candidates.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
candidates.summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

candidates.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
candidates.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.
